name: BlackBerry Ltd.
lede: BlackBerry runs three centers across three Indian cities. Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Noida, covering CoE and GCC/GIC, built over three years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BlackBerry office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BlackBerry Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BlackBerry runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Noida), covering CoE and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Vice President, QNX Engineering and Head of R&D Hyderabad

about.description: BlackBerry's India footprint covers Hyderabad, Bengaluru and Noida, spanning CoE and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does BlackBerry operate in India?
faq.a: BlackBerry operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BlackBerry have centers in?
faq.a: BlackBerry's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does BlackBerry run in India?
faq.a: BlackBerry runs CoE and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BlackBerry's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for BlackBerry's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BlackBerry's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at BlackBerry's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
